title: Adding else and elseif
description: Handle alternative paths and multiple conditions.

slides.title: The else Clause
if-else Example
elseif: Multiple Conditions
elseif in Action
slides.codeSnippet:
<?php
$score = 85;

if ($score >= 90) {
    echo "A";
} elseif ($score >= 80) {
    echo "B";
} elseif ($score >= 70) {
    echo "C";
} else {
    echo "F";
}
?>

quizData.explanation: $x > 10 is false, so it checks elseif $x > 0 which is true, so prints B.
